title: Nonschool Use of School Facilities: Distribution of Nonschool Literature
description: Conroe ISD has rules about how and when outside groups or individuals can hand out flyers, brochures, or other printed materials on school campuses or through the district. The policy sets clear guidelines to keep the distribution process orderly while protecting students and staff from unwanted or inappropriate content. Parents, students, and community members who want to share information through the district should understand these rules before submitting materials for approval.
